reviews.text: Mr. Larson, Mr. Lozano  and their team immediately got on my case after I contacted them. Within two days, I was already being seen by chiropractors and spine doctors and being sent in for MRIs. They got me all of the physical, neurological and psychological help that I needed. They handled my case completely and efficiently and with importance. They always kept me updated with the case proceedings, and were extremely knowledgeable, proficient, and professional throughout the whole experience. One of my coworkers was involved in a collision, and I had no hesitations in referring her to this firm. I’m hoping to never get into another collision, but if I do, I know they will take care of me just as well as they did with this one. I highly recommend Glen Larson and his team!

In 2024, I was involved in a motor vehicle accident that left me injured and resulted in my car being at a total loss. While searching for help, I came across Lovins Law Group and was connected to Rawan. From the beginning, she guided me through every step of the process and made and overwhelming situation so much easier to navigate.
Rawan stayed on top of every detail of my case and checked with me weekly, ensuring I always knew what was happening and what to expect. I couldn’t be more grateful for her support during such a difficult time. She consistently went above and beyond, and that meant the world to me.
Ro (Rawan Alkishawi) is THEEE ABSOLUTE BEST❤️‼️ She is very professional and she is extremely knowledgable.

In particular, I want to extend a special thanks to Rawan, who was incredibly helpful and supportive. She was always available to answer my questions and provide updates, ensuring that I felt informed and comfortable every step of the way. I highly recommend their services to anyone in need of reliable and compassionate legal assistance.

reviews.text: I highly recommend Pete Trosclair and his team for doing a fantastic job by dealing with insurance company, doctors and medical clinics. Months after a head injury, the decision making process is oftentimes one of the last improvements.  An injured brain is not visible and I did not understand why certain parts seemed ok while others were far from it.  I had never hired an attorney before and made a very poor decision on the first one.  After terminating that contract, I reached out to friends and co-workers for recommendations.  It was quite humbling and I refused to see myself as some sort of victim.  Eventually Pete was found.
When options were limited from many angles, he had the focused and stable brain I needed.  I am beyond grateful for his services and am extremely fortunate to have been his client.  In the coming years, his reputation will quietly grow exponentially across Texas.  It could not happen to a more genuine and diligent person.
Services was really reliable and got inform with information on time. The people that work with me are really great people and truth to their work.

reviews.text: Diligent and effective attorneys who really care about their clients!

The real deal.  Recognized by peers and clients alike as exceedingly bright and capable with laser like focus, these guys are expedient, responsive and absolute professionals at what they do.

God willing, you never need a personal injury firm.  If you do, however, don't hesitate one second to call Lovins I Trosclair.  I have known them professionally and personally for a long time.  Their stellar reputation is well deserved.  You'll want them on your side.

Pete Trosclair is a very knowledgeable, capable personal injury litigation attorney.  If you are looking for a top notch personal injury attorney who can handle litigation, his firm is at the top of the list.  Having worked with Pete personally on more than one occasion, I can tell you that he goes to bat for his clients and shows no mercy when dealing with adversaries in auto accident, personal injury and wrongful death claims.  If you have an accident case, I recommend hiring Pete Trosclair, as he is well respected among peers in Texas.

Wilson Trosclair & Lovins has been a true godsend for my wife and I.  We were in a car accident on central expressway back in December of 2012.  My wife took the brunt of the injuries with a broken foot and broken hand, but I had a neck injury as well.

Kenneth Trosclair handled our case personally.  He was a true professional.  Going through an accident like ours causes great stress, and he gave my wife and I some much needed piece of mind. He was our expert guide through the entire turmoil.  He dealt with the insurance companies, doctors, surgeons, and chiropractor.

I can't reiterate how fortunate we were to have WT&L represent us.  They were vital for us and really erased the unknowing.  Kenneth Trosclair kept us in the loop every step of the way.  I would definitely recommend using Wilson Trosclair & Lovins for anyone who was in an accident like ours. One can often feel powerless when going through a situation like ours, but don't feel that way.  Take the power back, and have WT&L help you as well.

My husband was in a serious car accident and the medical bills were extreme. The WTL firm took care of everything! Calling them was the best thing we could have done.  If ever there is another reason I will definitely be calling them again. They made my life so much easier,  I highly recommend Wilson Trosclair & Lovins.
reviews.ownerResponse: Kacy, I am glad you and your husband are happy with our legal services. Please call us in the future with any legal needs you may have.  Best of luck to the two of you in the future.

reviews.text:
I reached out to this firm after a deeply traumatic experience involving chemical contamination in a cup of coffee I purchased. From the beginning, I felt unheard and dismissed. I was repeatedly pushed to go back to the emergency room and told to insist something was wrong, even after I explained that I wasn’t seeking that kind of legal support—I was looking for someone to help me advocate for what I had already been through.

The final straw was when I received a follow-up call from someone who patronizingly asked, “What lawyer is going to take your case over a cup of coffee?” That coffee contained an unknown chemical. I ingested it. It doesn’t matter if I’m not in the ICU—the experience was real, and it left me traumatized.

I understand lawyers can be blunt, but there’s a line between being honest and being cold. A little empathy goes a long way. I’m disappointed in how I was treated and hope others are met with more care and respect.

reviews.text: If you wish to hire an attorney who will sue for all the money he thinks you might get and subject you to every medical test (needed or not needed) to win more money from insurance companies, then Nick is the attorney for you. If you wish to ask questions, proceed cautiously and use your own doctors, then Nick is not the attorney for you. When I asked questions at our initial meeting he said, "Am I wasting my time here? No one asks questions. They just sign the papers." I wanted an attorney who would listen to my questions and work with what our needs are. He also called and expected immediate responses, which was impossible due to the fact that I have small children with me and no child care. He even had the audacity to ask if I didn't care about my children, because I would not take them in for an MRI even though 2 (two) doctors examined my kids and said they did not need an MRI. In the end, working with Nick was a worse experience than the wreck we were in. And I know that he will reply to this and disparage me in his reply but know this: everything that I stated above is true. He is an attorney and will twist the story to make him look like the better person. You can do better. Find an attorney with more experience who will work for the person, not the 33.3% of the settlement.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I'm sorry to hear that you had a negative experience, Laura. To be fair, I always prioritize the well-being of my clients and make recommendations based on professional assessments to ensure the best possible outcome.

On communication, I strive for timely and clear responses, understanding the importance of each client's concerns. Regarding our meeting, I always encourage clients to ask questions to ensure they're fully informed throughout the process.

While every case is unique and comes with its challenges, I remain committed to providing the highest level of professionalism. If you have any further questions or issues, I'm more than willing to discuss them with you.

I wish you the best of luck with your case.

- Nick

reviews.text:
Absolutely the worst experience I’ve ever had with a law firm—crooks, in my opinion. I was in a car accident on July 26, 2024, when another driver failed to yield and totaled my brand-new Mercedes on my way to work. The at-fault driver was insured by Fred Loya Insurance, who refused to return my calls or help in any way.

I hired Hamideh Law Firm in early August, hoping they would represent me and help deal with the insurance company—things like getting a rental car, covering medical bills, and handling the claim properly. Unfortunately, they did none of that. The only thing they managed to do was schedule an appointment for me at a low-end clinic in a strip mall. No real communication, no help, no advocacy.

I quickly realized they weren’t working in my best interest and terminated their services on August 22, less than a month after hiring them.

Now, it’s August 2025, and Fred Loya is finally trying to settle the claim—but I’ve been informed that Hamideh Law Firm still expects to receive more than 33% of the settlement… for doing absolutely nothing. As a result, I’ll be left paying medical bills out of my own pocket for an accident that wasn’t even my fault—and after firing an attorney who did not represent me appropriately.

This entire experience has been a nightmare, and I would strongly caution anyone against hiring Hamideh Law Firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We’re sorry to hear that you were dissatisfied with your experience. After reviewing your file, it does appear that our office assisted you in locating a medical provider and advocated on your behalf with Fred Loya Insurance to push for acceptance of liability—something that had not occurred prior to your retaining our firm.

As explained at the outset, our representation was limited to your bodily injury claim. We do not handle property damage claims, and this was made clear during the intake process. We understand that this distinction may have been frustrating, but it does not reflect a failure on our part to fulfill our agreed-upon role.

We were unaware of any additional concerns you had with our services at the time of your termination. In fact, several months later, you contacted our office seeking to re-engage our representation, which we respectfully declined.

Because we work on a contingency basis—meaning we advance all costs and are only paid if there is a recovery—we must take steps to ensure that work performed under a valid contract is compensated, even if our representation is later terminated without cause.

We regret that you chose to end our representation prematurely, as we believe we could have helped you achieve a stronger outcome in your bodily injury claim. Nevertheless, we respect your decision and sincerely wish you a full recovery and the best moving forward.

reviews.text:
I used Beltz Law Firm several years ago and had a fantastic, hands-on experience. Unfortunately, my recent engagement in 2025 was completely different. Communication was poor, call center staff were undertrained, and their client portal is outdated. Payments and court notices were mismanaged to the point that a warrant was issued against me—completely defeating the purpose of hiring them.

Requests for updates were ignored or met with dismissive responses. When I inquired about expungement services, there was little initiative or willingness to guide me, despite my willingness to pay.

While I take responsibility for my traffic violations, Beltz failed to deliver the basic, worry-free service promised. If you want simple traffic tickets handled efficiently, do yourself a favor and work directly with the court.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Austin, I'm sorry to hear about your experience. It is true that you have been a long time client of ours. We truly appreciate your business over the years. On your expunction, it looks like you spoke with attorney Britney Brown about that issue. The main problem was that you were not eligible for an expunction. From the notes, it doesn't look like it was dismissive from her perspective. However, she did have to relay the unfortunate information that you simply did not qualify. I understand this can be upsetting, but expunctions are statutory in nature. Either you qualify or you don't. And based on the case information given, you did not qualify. On the payment issue, our legal software program sets very detailed reminders for each client informing them of payment due dates, etc. It is true we have made payments for you in the past, but on the case you called about, we were never paid to make that specific payment. The notes we have on file related to your conversation with Britney are as follows:
"It looks like client was confused about what cases he made payment for and what he didn't. It looks like we have paid other tickets for him and there was some confusion because he thought we paid this one for him as well. So when he called in June he thought he was calling to confirm that we had made the payment for him. Darwin doesn't have any notes about that part of the conversation so I'm not sure what was discussed. I let him know at this point he just needs to pay the citation. He was also asking about expunctions for DWIs from 10 years ago but I told him if they were convictions there was nothing we could do. I pulled up one on Collin county and it was a DWI second with a conviction. He thought the other was fate, but I checked Rockwall and Hunt counties and did not find any open cases. He asked if we could expunge tickets off of his driving record and I told him no."
Communication is a difficult art. One person can interpret the conversation as good, while another can interpret the same conversation as bad. In every instance, we are trying our best to get you the best information possible in as best a manner as we can. Do we fall short sometimes? Absolutely. Did we fall short in your case? From your perspective, it is obvious we did. All I can do is apologize and let you know that we have truly enjoyed having you as a client. We are sorry that fell short in your eyes. But please know we are always striving to perfect our craft and will continue to do so. I will bring this review up in our next staff meeting to address the importance of clear communication to all staff members in the hope that we can find ways to improve. Thank you for your input and we wish you the best in the future.

reviews.text:
I called Beltz Law firm right after my trial and they said an attorney would call me back. Waited a week, never got a call back. I ended up giving a call back and then they were trying to charge me $100 more for “expedited” service. I explained how I called them and I was waiting for a call back from an attorney but never got a call back. They didn’t care and hung up the phone. Bad customer service, bad attorneys that don’t call you back, bad law firm all around. Wish I could give them 0 star.

Edit: I just saw Beltz Law firm reply to my review. They’re trying to make me look like the bad person and also lying about how they chose not to deal with my case. That is a lie, I haven’t done anything for them to deny my case. I gave them my case info and was waiting for a call back from the attorney, I didn’t do anything else. They’re lying to make themselves look better and make my review irrelevant. Says a lot about a firm that makes a potential client look like a bad person just to try to save their reputation. I guarantee if I paid the extra $100 for “expedited” service they would’ve worked on my case, they did NOT deny me because of my “attitude” or whatever else the owner replied with.
reviews.ownerResponse: To the public at large reading this, it is important to understand how attorney client relationships develop so you don't make the same mistake Tausif made.  We are a highly sought after firm for appellate work.  Not every person that calls a law office will end up becoming a client.  Some people who have bad attitudes or demand services or particular results that we cannot provide, we simply turn down.  This doesn't mean that Tausif is a bad person or that we are a bad firm.  It just means that we chose not to have him as a client.  Tausif said himself in the review that he had already lost at trial.  This means we would have needed to appeal the decision which isn't easy.  Appeals are hard work and it takes an understanding and patient client to realize that to overturn a bad result at trial is not a guarantee.  We didn't get that vibe from Tausif and that is OK.  As stated earlier, an attorney client relationship is a two way street.  We have the right to reject people as clients just as a person has the right to choose whatever attorney they wish to help them through a situation.  If you come across as demanding, unrealistic or difficult, many times that can be an indication to a lawyer that they will not be able to work well with you.  In our office we train regularly on developing relationships with clients who share the same understanding, compassion and goals that we do.  If we feel that a client is not on that same level, we simply turn them down.  We don't wish anybody any ill will in that determination.  But we are experienced enough to know when a person like Tausif doesn't get their way exactly as they want it, then they are not going to be good client candidates.  As a friendly piece of advice, make sure when you discuss your potential case with a lawyer that you understand the law office is evaluating you as a client just as much as you are evaluating them to be your lawyer.  It is a relationship that is developed together.  And please know that if a lawyer turns your case down, you are not entitled to that lawyer's help.  They have a right to reject your case for any reason they see fit.  Just like you have the right to choose any lawyer you see fit.

reviews.text:
Not worth it. They didn't even get my ticket reduced. Still have to pay warrant fees ect.
Your reply is hysterical. The ticket was sent via the mail and was never received. If I had known about said ticket, it would have been paid. I was never served any paperwork from the courts.
Plain and simple you all failed to do your job.
reviews.ownerResponse: To the public reading this review, the first indication of what this person was up against is the phrase, "warrant fees."  This means this person had a warrant for their arrest.  If they would not have hired a lawyer, then they could have been arrested for neglecting their ticket to the point that an active warrant had to be issued to force them to deal with their responsibilities.  That is the situation they were in before they even chose to hire a lawyer.  When a case is in warrant, they take super priority in our office.  We rush the case to the top of the stack and file the necessary paperwork to remove the warrant so the client does not have to worry about getting arrested.  I can guarantee you that this is exactly what happened in this case as well.  So while this review is claiming that not getting arrested isn't a service that is "worth it" I would think that most people would rather not sit in jail over a ticket.  In most cases, we only charge $100 to $150.00 to remove a warrant for tickets.  So you can decide if that fee is worth it or not.  Next, after the warrant is lifted, we have to go back to court to resolve the actual ticket.  This is where we fight to protect our client's record before any money is paid to the court.  Because if this client would have just went down to the court and paid off the ticket to remove the warrant, they would have had a conviction on their record.  By doing this, their insurance rates would have increased.  What we normally see, is a $30 to $50 increase per month depending on the type of warrant and conviction that was reported to DPS.  This normally impacts a person for 3 years.  Do the math.  $30 times 36 months = $1080.00.  This is the minimum amount of money we save clients on the back end when a warrant is removed and driving record is protected.  Finally, If you wait until your case goes into warrant, we can guarantee you that your fees to that court will be higher.  The law allows courts to recoup the fee for the issuance of the warrant to compensate a police officer for having to arrest you.  So if you want lower fees with the court, hire your lawyer before the case goes into warrant.  You control that.  We don't.  The purpose of this response is to emphasize that knowledge is power.  Understanding the police, court system and how fees are assessed to a ticket is how you save money.  Hopefully this review helps someone out there understand that warrant fees are not something we as lawyers control.  It is something you control.  And when a warrant fee is added to your case, it because of you, not your lawyer.

Watching my attorney be the only counselor  brave enough to debate and argue with the judge about my rights face to face made it all worth it. I knew I was in good hands, and you will be as well. reviews.text:
Exceptional Support for My Car Accident Case
I was recently involved in a car accident while on vacation in Texas, and as an Oregon resident, navigating the legal process across state lines felt overwhelming. Thankfully, I reached out to Herz Law Firm, and their team made the entire experience manageable, professional, and stress-free. Their commitment to clarity and communication truly sets them apart.
From the moment I contacted them, the entire team prioritized keeping me informed. They explained every step of the process in plain language, ensuring I understood my rights and options as an Oregon resident dealing with a Texas accident. Whether it was gathering evidence like police reports and medical records or handling negotiations with the insurance companies, they were proactive and transparent. I never felt left in the dark, which was a huge relief during such a stressful time.
Their communication was outstanding. They responded promptly to my calls and emails, often checking in even when there were no major updates, just to keep me reassured. This level of care made me feel like more than just a case number—they genuinely understood the challenges of dealing with an accident far from home. The team’s expertise in handling cross-state cases was impressive. They coordinated seamlessly to secure a fair settlement that covered my medical expenses, vehicle repairs, and other damages, all while I focused on recovery. Their compassion and professionalism made a difficult situation feel manageable, and I couldn’t be more grateful for their support.
I highly recommend Herz Law Firm to anyone needing a car accident attorney, especially if you’re dealing with the complexities of an out-of-state incident. Their dedication to clarity, communication, and client care is unmatched. Thank you for helping me get back on my feet!
reviews.ownerResponse: Damarcus, thank you for your detailed review. We always want people to feel at home even when they're halfway across the country! Hope you never have to worry about anything like this again.

reviews.text: It was a very smooth process and the law firm helped me get what I deserved. They were very friendly and  Communication was great. If you’re in a car wreck definitely call them.

The process was a headache to handle on my own, and I was so grateful Salam and Associates took on my case. They always took their time explaining things to me, kept me in the loop of developments in a timely manner, were very responsive to inquiries, and thankfully made the process easy and pain free. They did an excellent job navigating negotiations for my settlement and were always very upfront with me throughout that process, which I really appreciated. I hold them in high regard and would definitely recommend them to anyone. Thanks for everything Fatima and the team at Salam and Associates.
reviews.ownerResponse: Good Morning.  Thank you for giving us the opportunity to represent you.

reviews.text: Ms. Salam is an outstanding attorney and advocate. I was so overwhelmed after my car wreck because I had multiple physical injuries as well as a brain injury. I have never filed a lawsuit before, but I knew because of the extent of my injuries, I would not be able to navigate the process alone. Ms. Salam guided me through the process and made sure I was taken care of. She didn’t have to, but she provided emotional support to me as well. She is tough, brilliant, and fair. I received the extensive medical care that I needed and a settlement that more than took care of my lost wages and suffering. Her staff was also extremely kind and patient with me even though I took longer than I should to respond to things because I was mired in anxiety and depression. I would never have been able to achieve any of this on my own, and I am so grateful to Ms. Salam and her staff.

reviews.text:
My experience with this law firm started in June 2020. It is now February 2023. So when I leave this review, I can leave it with all honesty.
From day one James Best was honest and open with me. He was concerned about my health and recovery. He explained the necessary steps it would take to ensure I was getting the proper medical attention needed.
Through this law firm I was sent to specialists for my neck, back and shoulder injury. I was sent to a psychologist for PTSD treatment. I had surgery and rehabilitation on my shoulder, numerous procedures on my neck and back to avoid surgery.
Though it all, I was not asked once for money. I was asked instead, how I was doing, did I think the treatments were helping, was there anything else I needed?
When Patrick Watson became involved in the settlement and trial part of my case, he was very open and honest.
We met and he explained the next several steps that would be involved in order to present a stronger case.
Mr. Watson was extremely knowledgeable and professional and talked in language my wife and I understood. All our questions were answered fully and satisfactory.
Mr. Watson or his assistant, Chrsitina Gonzales, kept me updated on all steps involved. They always asked and made sure that I was receiving proper health care.
During meditation of my case Mr. Watson was able to negotiate a higher sum than expected.
When Mr. Watson settled everything, he was able to save me more money.
Asked if I would recommend this law firm, Yes, In the strongest way possible.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Tk,

We strive to address all the needs of our clients. There is more to our services than just getting you the settlement you deserve. Just as important, is the priority we put on guiding, our clients and their families, through the physical, emotional and financial stresses that are inherent to an accident and subsequent legal actions. Thank you for leaving such a wonderful review and recommendation. We appreciate that you took the time to acknowledge all the services we provide. It was our pleasure to work with and for you.

I wouldn’t recommend them to anyone. Lack of communication, being lied to, being in the dark about what is going on sends fumes through me. These are things that I have voiced and still nothing has changed. I am literally boiling inside. One thing I don’t believe in doing is unnecessary stuff. I will add the FULL details on THAT at a later time. Trying to get help with funding and your case manager just responds with denied to the company without even sending the documents or doesn’t respond to requests for documentation. I shouldn’t have to use a certain company just because “we work with them”. That’s not your choice. It’s not your money. I’m so upset with this whole thing. 10/23

3/6/2026 I’ve had 3 different negotiators. The first one , I never got a chance to speak with before I was switched to the second one. She started off responsive, ended with lack of communication (THE ONLY CONSISTENCY IS CONSISTENT LACK OF COMMUNICATION),dismissive attitude,follow up dates (I was told that she would reach out by 2/11. She did not, I had to call her) given with no follow up unless I reached out. In the past 2 weeks, I’ve been switched to another negotiator due to that one moving on to new endeavors. I did not know this until I called (2/27) and tried to speak with the lady that had been assigned to me. I last communicated with her on 2/20(because I reached out of course). I am now assigned to a new person. We spoke, they seemed okay. Then BAM!!! There goes that inconsistency showing up again.
This is BEYOND frustrating.
Some lessons you don’t have to learn for yourself. Others have and in turn are willing to share with the class. Still wouldn’t recommend. Not even to my enemies.
My personal experience currently going through it is HORRIBLE.

When I initially retained the services of the Godsey Law Firm in September, the level of professionalism and communication I experienced was exemplary. At that time, our case representative was Amanda, and the experience was nothing short of outstanding. The staff was consistently courteous, responsive, and transparent in their communication. They ensured that no details were overlooked and kept us thoroughly informed throughout the process. I genuinely appreciated the professionalism displayed while navigating medical treatment and other aspects related to the case. I am certainly aware this law firm has thousands of clients, I feel I've been more than patient.
However, as we have progressed into March, my experience has changed significantly. My case is now being handled by another case manager and unfortunately, communication has become virtually nonexistent. Since September, I believe I have only spoken with her once, and that was on Valentine's Day of this year. Aside from that single interaction, I have been unable to reach her or receive any meaningful updates regarding the status of my case.
Each time I call the office, the receptionist attempts to assist but is unable to reach anyone associated with my case. I have even requested to speak directly with the attorneys involved, yet those attempts have also been unsuccessful. The receptionist has repeatedly informed me that my number would be marked as an emergency contact and that someone would return my call within three hours. Unfortunately, those promised callbacks have never occurred.
For context, my husband and I were involved in a car accident in September. He has already received his settlement, while I, the driver involved in the incident, remain completely uninformed about the progress of my own case. Every time I call seeking clarification or simply an update, I am met with silence and unreturned calls.
This level of disregard for client communication is deeply frustrating and, frankly, highly unprofessional. The firm began this process with remarkable service and attentiveness, but the current lack of responsiveness reflects a drastic decline in the quality of client care.
At this point, it seems my only remaining option is to leave a public review in hopes that someone within the firm will finally address my concerns and provide clarity regarding the status of my case. It is unfortunate that such measures even feel necessary simply to obtain basic communication about a legal matter that directly affects me.
T Nguyen

reviews.text: Thought they was go get me something I was hit from the back they gave the case ti a smaller firm

This is my first time going this route after having a minor accident and this is the most drawn out process ever. At the beginning, everything was moving along, my caseworker Morgan seemed knowledgeable, but was not good at giving advice or steering in what direction… You get sent off to PT and once PT ended that’s when things started to get drawn out way too long and repeatedly getting told it takes several weeks. Expect PT to be 2-3 months, Don’t expect to get paid out if you miss work for PT, that will be a loss, so I hope you got money saved up if you have to miss work and still pay bills… they will tell you it will take 10-12 weeks to get records from doctors offices/hospitals etc, once those are in, it will take 4-5 weeks to close your case, and then when your case is settled. Then you have to wait for them to close it out, that could be 2 weeks, and then another 4-5 weeks to get paid out.

My case has settled and James Rushing is my point of contact. I had my accident in beginning of June, it’s now November and I have not seen a check yet. It has been 8 weeks now and I have made several calls with no return calls from him. Very unprofessional and not being upfront with clients. Honestly, these folks are just telling clients 4-5 weeks and have no idea when anything will get closed or processed and once that time is up, they’re mia because they don’t know what to tell you. In my opinion! I even tried not to hound the law office and check in every 2 weeks, but no return calls still. All in all, will I go through this process again? No idea. Will I use this law firm? Most likely not after this experience.

I recently had the pleasure of working with the Godsey-Martin Law Firm for my auto accident case, and I cannot praise them enough for their professionalism and dedication. From our initial consultation to the resolution of my case, they maintained clear communication and made sure I understood every step of the process.

The attorneys at Godsey-Martin Law are not only knowledgeable but also genuinely caring. Juan Aguirre and Manal Kattan took the time to listen to my concerns, answered all my questions promptly, and provided thoughtful guidance throughout the ordeal. Their expertise was evident, and it was clear they had my best interests at heart.

One of the standout aspects of their service was their thorough approach to gathering evidence and building my case. They worked diligently to ensure that all necessary documentation was in order, which ultimately led to a favorable outcome. I was impressed by their negotiation skills, which ensured that I received a fair settlement for my injuries and damages.

Additionally, the support staff, including Felayne Cruz and Josie Monconduit, were incredibly helpful and always available to assist with any administrative tasks or inquiries I had. This level of support made a challenging situation much easier to navigate.

Overall, I highly recommend the Godsey-Martin Law Firm to anyone in need of legal representation for an auto accident case. Their commitment, expertise, and compassionate service make them an excellent choice. Thank you for a job well done!

Like many, I was skeptical about hiring a personal injury attorney. However, I am happy I did.

I was involved in an auto accident and I was not-at-fault. I was hit from behind by a driver who had minimum limits for auto insurance. My car was totaled, and I was left with a life-long back injury.  Without Mullen & Mullen, I would not have been able to navigate my care.

My Attorney, Joe Morrison, was great to work with. He responded to my inquires in a timely manner and explained the process along the way. He respected the outcome I was looking to achieve and worked on my behalf to obtain it.

reviews.text: My experience with this law firm has been the worst experience I’ve ever had with any attorney! I experienced the same issue of no communication as stated in reviews here. I’ve had to file a bar complaint due to their gross behavior I’ve experienced! There is a complete lack of transparency as the try to act like they control what you can and can not see regarding your settlement. They tried to act as if a medical lien was a full itemized report of my settlement when that was just one of the providers I saw. I have asked for a full itemized report including the treatment facilities they sent me to that they themselves said can reduce their bills but when they’re upset at you now they can’t seem to show you how much they paid them. I asked to see my full first offer as I’m entitled to before and acceptance or renegotiating as well and have been given no word on it yet they were somehow able to tell me at the end of this you’re looking at possibly 1100 and then immediately said would 3,000 be ok! That means you have some sort of number you’re looking at to make these calculations and lied to my face saying they gave me a full itemized report which as just one providers medical lien on my claim. They get upset that you’re upset at the non responsiveness they give you and when you catch them on their BS. I advise every to know their full legal remedies when dealing with Stanley and associates incase you need them when they don’t think you have way to recover what is fully yours and for the time the games being played with your claim.
reviews.ownerResponse: We’re truly sorry to hear about your experience and regret the communication and transparency issues you describe. We take client concerns and any bar complaints very seriously and will promptly review your file. Please contact our Client Relations team using the phone number or email listed on our website so we can provide a complete, itemized accounting of your settlement, including offers and payments to providers. We are committed to resolving this matter fairly and cooperating fully with any regulatory review.

reviews.text: Dike Law group is amazing. Great customer service. Highly recommended for your legal needs.

Dike Law Group was instrumental in helping me navigate the legal aspects of negotiating my ownership stake in a medical practice. Their team was knowledgeable, detail-oriented, and responsive throughout the entire process. They ensured that the partnership agreement accurately reflected my interests and protected me as I transitioned into an ownership role. Thanks to their expertise and support, I felt confident throughout the entire process. I highly recommend them to any healthcare professional seeking reliable legal counsel in business or partnership matters!

Since partnering with the Dike Law Firm two years ago, my private medical practice has never felt more secure or supported. Doris Dike is an exceptional advocate, sharp, intelligent and incredibly strategic in her work. She brings a level of professionalism and insight that is both reassuring and empowering. Doris and her team leave no stone unturned, ensuring every detail is thoroughly addressed and no vulnerabilities are overlooked. Having Dike Law Firm on my side has been one of the best decisions for my business, and I cannot recommend them highly enough.

Doris and her team have absolutely gone above and beyond the call of duty to help me with my issues in my business. I am so grateful for their amazing communication, their efficiency, and their kindness throughout the entire process. I am so grateful for the contracts they have updated for my business-it has created clarity in everything we do. They also have helped with HR related problems and helping us navigate those things with ease. Thank you so much!!!

I reached out to Dike Law Group for assistance in reviewing my first employment contract and with my application to TMB. If I could give negative stars, I would!! My experience with Kelso Law was a complete nightmare. I reached out to them in December of 2024 and I was initially assigned an attorney who was very helpful and said he'd find an expert to review my case. As my case progressed with him, it all seemed to be going great. Then, suddenly, everything changed for the worse!

Out of the blue, I received a call from someone named Jessica, an assistant from the firm. She began asking me random questions about my case that I had already answered in detail with my attorney. When I asked why she was contacting me instead of my attorney, she casually told me he had been removed from my case. This was the first time she had mentioned it the entire call and I only found out because I asked. Looking back, that lack of communication should've been my first red flag.

Jessica then told me that the head attorney Rhiannon Kelso would be handling my case moving forward and she'd be assisting her. She also said we'd have to start everything over from scratch which was incredibly frustrating. In my opinion, Jessica was painfully slow, disorganized, and careless.

Then after what felt like a waste of five months of my life, I finally spoke to Rhiannon Kelso. She was 24 minutes late to the call and in my opinion seemed unfamiliar with my case, interrupted me frequently, and raised her voice at me a few times. After about 40 minutes, she informed me that the firm wouldn’t move forward due to the financial cost of expert fees—something that, in my opinion, should’ve been communicated months earlier. As I understand it, all medical and dental malpractice cases require experts.

If you look at their negative reviews, I believe most of them mention Rhiannon Kelso by name which I’m not surprised by. In my opinion, she lacked professionalism and empathy. To me their responses to negative reviews also seem to be copy and pasted, with no real accountability. That says everything.

While no law firm can take every case, how you treat people during the process matters. In my experience, Kelso Law failed at every step. I would never recommend them to anyone!

He believed in my version of what had happened and he believed in me!  My wife and I liked him for his demeanor, explanations of the legal aspects, and his energy. He does not nickle and dime you for everything he does, which includes going well above and beyond his abligations as your attorney.  I would, and I have, recommended him highly. I was very happy with the large settlement l was awarded.

Jerry worked diligently to help my husband and I recover, physically and financially, after being struck by a negligent driver.  I won't hesitate to call him again, if the need should ever arise.  I can't imagine trying to deal with this mess ourselves.  He and his team are aggressive and professional, and easily accessible whenever I needed guidance.  They handled my case completely and turned a nightmare into a stress-free process.
Cathie was always very nice and helped any way she could for my case, they took care of any issues we had and were very responsive and professional. I would recommend them to anyone!

I new from day one i chose the right firm..
Everybody was very professional and super informative..
Keep me up to date, every step of the way..
Especially (Tabitha) who i dealt with mostly, was truly a breath of fresh air.. Cant thank you enough..
God bless..
reviews.ownerResponse: Marshall thank you so much for the great review. Tabitha is a wonderful attorney and all of our staff works very hard for our clients. It is so gratifying when clients like you take the time to let us know. Thanks again. Julie Johnson.

reviews.text: I called but they didn't return my call
I'd almost lost hope that this case would be resolved with any meaningful outcome but Caleb proved me wrong. Weldone guys. Caleb you are the champ 👍💯
reviews.ownerResponse: Oneil- Thank you for taking the time to leave such a kind review. We try really hard to help our clients. Thank you for the opportunity to have my firm represent you. Regards- Julie Johnson

reviews.text: Lawyers here do know what they doing and help you with any way they can. They do care about you and your right's.

I highly recommend attorney Molly Scott with the Julie Johnson Firm!  Molly was able to negotiate an excellent settlement amount for the auto collision I was involved in.  She kept me well informed during the entire process and was always prompt in returning phone calls and emails.  Molly is a very dedicated attorney with many years experience, a true asset to the Julie Johnson Firm!
reviews.ownerResponse: Courtney - thank you for taking the time to provide your kind review. I agree with you- Molly is great and our clients love her. I am thrilled you had such a great experience. Thank you for the privilege to represent you.

reviews.text: Ms. Cathie has done nothing short of make my awful experience with my wreck become something that seemed timeless and past tense.. I couldn’t have asked for a better law firm personally! Ms. Cathie constantly kept me updated, as well as continued to make sure I was doing okay in my health. I highly recommend JJL especially Ms. Cathie!

When no one else would even take the time to listen. I know my case was not a big case, but the fact of the matter was, I was hurt. Miss, Cathie  sat down with me and listened to everything that mattered in regards to the incident. She kept in touch with me throughout the full case, from the starting day to the last very moment and even after, just to check on me.
I have no complaints at all, but very good feed for Miss Cathie Taylor and the firm. Miss Cathie, you are an amassing person in my book, I would refer anyone to you. Take care. And once again. Thank you for all you done for me.
Dee Dee

I’ve dealt with Tabitha Charles for a couple of years and the service has been awesome. She’s very professional. It didn’t matter how I contacted via email or phone she always got back with me. I’ve had other attorneys in the past but never got the service I received at this law firm. They are very very professional yet compassionate about your case and injuries. I would recommend Tabitha to everyone. You won’t go wrong!!!
When I was rear ended while pregnant and left with emergency room bills, Molly and team were amazing!  So helpful and compassionate. Don't know what I would have done without them.

Not at all happy,  nor impressed with anything.  I feel,  I was totally burned and left with a massive bill. Robin was,  hands down the worst Attorney. Do yourself a favor,  it's too late for me.  Move on.  Find someone else.
Also, be careful of the good reviews.  They give you a discount if you give a good review on here for them. FYI

I was in Dallas for a conference, when I took a fall at the venue and broke my foot.  When I got back to NC I was able to think about the negligence of the venue as they left equipment on the floor, as well as the treatment after my fall which was not how it should have been.

I made the decision to talk to an attorney to see if I had a case to at the least get my medical cost covered.  I read reviews on many attorneys and pick the Julie Johnson firm based on their reviews.

From the first conversation they agreed that I should be compensated and they were willing to take my case on.  Molly Scott was assigned my case and has been amazing to work with.  There are times of silence, but that is the judicial system and the process, has nothing to do with the service of the law firm.  If I reach out to Molly, she answers me with what she knows at the time, even if it is nothing!

When I flew to Dallas for deposition I was greeted like an old friend and Molly supported me and prepared me for the process.  There is no doubt that I got lucky when I chose this firm and even luckier when Molly was assigned my case.

I got their information from a family friend who had used their services in the past. They came highly recommended so I decided to use them for my personal injury following a bad car accident. But my experience has been mediocre at best. Today, after 4+ months of litigation, I was expressing disappointment with a few things regarding an outcome in my case, when I was told by my attorney that if I didn't like her services I could seek another attorney. Who says that to someone who they are working on behalf of?? This is not the first time that she has been rude to me, as the other times I just let it go and said maybe she was having a bad day. I've given her tons of grace, but after this, I am done. As a professional myself, I cannot imagine speaking to a client or customer in such a manner. I'm disappointed. I'm sure there are other great attorneys there, but my experience here was not great. I absolutely adore Rep Julie Johnson and all that she does here in our state. She takes care of people and I know she would want the same to be happening in her law office as well, but for me I don't feel like it did. I will end up paying more in medical bills than the actual portion of the settlement I will receive. Sad.

In 2015 a 15 pound of metal fell off an 18 wheeler and it almost killed me. But with Cathie and Julie’s help my family might not of made it through all this without their support. Julie was the best at the mediation process. If you want the best Team behind you and your family, then your best with Law Office of Julie Johnson!! Never will have any doubts!!!!
Absolutely amazing. Very nice and professional couldn’t have asked for a better outcome.

I have been a client of Robin Rubrecht Zegen  and she has been great. She answers all my questions right away and is there when I need her. I have recommended her to several people and will continue to do so.

I would not dare recommend anyone I know to this law firm! Everybody else who is employed there may be nice and have great customer service skills but ROBIN oh my God!! She treated me & my husband the worst way possible. As soon as we walked into her office and she seen us she had a snotty look on her face, She didn't even greet us nor did she introduce herself to us. As my husband was talking to her about his case she did not respond nor ask questions, She kept it VERY SHORT, so I stood up and told her " Your not evening trying to help us right when we walked in you looked like you were disgusted by us, so thank you for your time, we are leaving" " and I'll make sure to write a review on you" All she said was ok.... So as we walked out we just could not believe she treated us that way. So I felt like I needed to let someone else know our experience there. In the car now I call the law firm and ask to speak to someone over her. So I am transferred over to Robin (AGAIN) she did not introduce herself to me. So i asked her I need to speak to someone in charge because we were treated very rude. She said yeah this is me and you told me how rude I was ( laughing while saying it ) I told her whats your name? and that is when she said Robin ( so that is how I found out her name ) ( because from the beginning she never introduced herself) I told her I need to speak to someone in charge ( someone over you ) who is that? and that is when she said that's Julie. So I left my Name & Number with her to give to Julie. Thankfully Julie called me back and I was able to explain to her our experience there with robin @ her law firm and how that was so rude and uncalled for. So again I will never go back there myself nor will I ever refer anyone there!

The legal team at Julie Johnson Law is simply the best. Their expertise helped me navigate the overwhelming nightmare of insurance companies, medical specialists, and red tape due to my brain injury. They patiently answered my questions and provided me with regular updates throughout the entire process.  I was especially pleased that they were able to bring my case to a successful conclusion through mediation rather than a lengthy trial process. It was such a comfort to know that I had a compassionate and understanding team that was there to help. Thank you Julie and Cathie!!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Greg,
It was truly a pleasure to work with you! Itwas a long journey though your medical treatment and navigating the complex issues in your case. I am so pleased as to the outcome and that you are so happy. Please stay in touch and let me know if we can ever help you in the future.
Regards,
Julie Johnson

reviews.text: Julie and Cathy were amazing they helped from the day of my accident to my recovery and still after kept in touch. Best lawyers I have ever had. I truly recommend them 100%. They get the job done no matter what. They will keep you in the loop as well not just go about their business with other clients I was #1 to them all the time.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you for your kind words. I am so glad you entrusted us with your case. It is rewarding to be able help clients such as yourself. We wish you all the best going forward.
Regards,
Julie Johnson

reviews.text: They were more than understanding and patient with my needs. They listened and accommodated me in every way possible without leading me on. I highly recommend this law firm. They are honest and fair and eager to help.

Hi I'm Kenneth , and I would like to recommend the law office of Julie Johnson the staff is kind and polite and they always return your call the law office of Julie Johnson worked very diligently on my case and I am very pleased with their results I think the law office of Julie Johnson it's the best law firm in Dallas Texas and I would recommend them to all of my friends. I suggest if you have a personal injury case please contact the law office of Julie Johnson you won't be disappointed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Kenneth! It is the best compliment when a client recommends us to their family and friends.

reviews.text: The Law Office of Julie Johnson and all their employees have been absolutely amazing in getting me my settlement money after being badly hit and injured in a car accident. They were reliable and ALWAYS available to answer any questions I had about my case. I worked with Tabitha Charles in particular and she was phenomenal. She explained to me the entire process and kept me informed. I couldn't be more pleased. Highly recommended!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mia,

Thank you for your kind review. We always strive for excellence with our clients and I am so glad you are so happy!
Best Regards,

reviews.text: I recently asked Robin from this office to represent me with my case for termination of the fathers rights. I had no idea as to what I was doing nor what I needed to do. Robin made me feel very comfortable and was very knowledgable about the whole process. Bianca her assistant was very quick to email me back if I ever had questions, and I was never left in the dark wondering where my case was at. I would highly recommend Robin to anyone who needed representation.

I can't begin to tell you how much I appreciate all Robin and Bianca did for me during my case. I came in for my initial consultation scared and overwhelmed. I had no idea what to expect during the divorce process. Bianca came in and explained the contract. Everything was completely straight forward. Robin came in afterward and talked to me about what I could expect throughout the process. Afterward, we talked like friends. She allowed a safe place for me to share my situation and gave me constructive encouragement. I felt empowered and at peace. Once the petition had been filed, we discussed going straight to mediation. Robin uses a fantastic mediator. My divorce, from filing to final, was at just about 3 months. Mediation facilitated a smooth settlement, and I cannot recommend it enough. A big THANK YOU to the Law Office of Julie Johnson (Robin Rubrecht Zegen and Bianca specifically)!!!!
Interested and caring. That's how I describe the excellent service I received from this Firm. Robin and Julie did a fantastic job and I would recommend her and the firm to anyone.

Robin and Bianca were wonderful! I had A LOT of questions because I had never been in my situation before and they were so patient and kind in answering ALL of my questions :)
I HIGHLY recommend this Law Firm to everyone!

I was involved in an accident in which I was injured.  I had a consultation and they were up front, concise and explained the process to me.  I provided the information and paperwork I had and they took over from there.  They dealt with insurance companies for me and handled everything.  There's no way I would have been able to navigate through the process, I am glad I had them on my side.  I can't recommend them enough!

The law office of Julie Johnson staff was very helpful with getting me through one of the most difficult times of my life...a divorce...the staff was empathetic with the challenges I faced during the divorce which included, being 1000 miles away from the Dallas area. They truly assisted me with minimizing the amount of travel time that was needed to get through preparation, planning, arbitration and then finally the final court case.  Thanks all for being there for me!!!

I am so grateful 🥹 I was introduced to Mrs. Avila the same week my son passed away. I had turned down 3 attorneys already. However it was something about Maggie that I was drawn to. I am so grateful that this Attorney and Associates fought for me and my husband. No amount of money could ever bring our son back, however with ppl like these that can stand up for me and my family we are so ever grateful! God bless these Attorneys and may GOD bless their minds and hands to continue to fight the good fight ❤️

My case was transferred to Dan Morales from Jim Adler and he took care of me and got me a settlement that felt like a victory. Also great service from Tania at the office when I showed up over there as well! Recommended!

Their office will schedule a consultation for $295, and Attorney Sean Lopez will give incompetent advice, stating HOA discrimination rules supercede Federal and Florida state laws, totally incompetent. In my case, the HOA is requiring a sexual relationship, or no one can live with you. Must be domestic partner, spouse, or Significant other.  A nonsexual relationship, (platonic) is nor allowed.

Attorney Sean Lopez didn't understand, and told me any HOA bylaw supercede Federal and state discrimination laws.
Gene Lamento
reviews.ownerResponse:
Joyce, you must have your offices confused;

1) My office doesn’t charge for a consultation;
2) I don’t have an office in FL;
3) We do not practice HOA and/or administrative law;
4) MOST IMPORTANTLY…THERE IS NO SEAN LOPEZ AT MY OFFICE

Please correct your improper review as it obviously does not apply to my Texas Personal Injury Law Firm.

Thank you. R E Lopez

reviews.text: My husband was in an accident and had to be in the hospital for several days. The lawyers helped me with the entire process. Thanks to them, I received fair compensation.

are very professional and really help you out, would recommend this place if you had an accident

M daughter was recently in a car accident who was minor  and Zayra helped me from start to finish.  I was referred by a friend that had a good experienced with them. Im glad I trusted Mr. Lopez and his staff. They were very patient with us because I didn't know the whole trouble you go through whenever you are in car accident. Yes, I was that client that called all the time. Thank you , I highly recommend them.
Excellent service; this is the second time they've helped me. They always kept me informed, and my compensation was very good.

Very unprofessional… No communication whatsoever… they held my case for 7 months with no updates, no leads. Ended up sending me a drop letter after 7 months with no explanation. The customer service reps were extremely unprofessional as well, and the paralegals were not on my side. I felt discriminated against and I would NEVER recommend them to ANYONE
reviews.ownerResponse:

Moreover, we have detailed records of communicating with you each and every time you called.

Horrible experience, I do not recommend, they get over on there clients I have multiple witnesses who will contest.

THEY ARE NOT GOOD AT COMMUNICATION & VERY SECRETIVE !!! I REPEAT !! I DO NOT RECOMMEND!!!

For a case that happened months ago there is no way We received absolutely no offer when the insurance company excepted liability!!! RED FLAG 🚩

I DO NOT RECOMMEND!!! VERY SNEAKY, NOT TRANSPARENT, CONNED me and everyone else injured in our vehicle out of thousands I do not recommend!!! Unless you don’t care about your settlement amount or communicating with your actual attorney.worst firm I’ve had buisness with by far!!!!
Great law firm. Great services.
I had a bad car accident. My uncle brought me to R. Lopez and Morales. They have been a big help and got me the maximum settlement I could get.
Rude, won’t call me back, unprofessional and altogether unpleasant. I absolutely hate calling or dealing with them. The lawyer Mr Morales was pretty impressive, but the paralegals are god awful.
Fast,Efficient and very helping. They would walk thru the steps with you if you feel lost in anything.
I loved the service because they speak Spanish and explain the procedure very well. I recommend them 100%; they provide excellent service.

I recommended these people with my husband and it was a really bad experience. They changed his adjuster without giving him any reason and they put someone who really changed things. They told him at the beginning that it was 33% of what he would be left with and in the end it wasn't like that. They took half of the total and of what he was left with, he had to pay bills and he was left with debts only for them to keep more than 15 thousand dollars and we with the same amount and with 3 debts in collection.
They were very helpful with my accident, case was settled in 4 months which was pretty fast and, excellent job overall.
Excellent service ❤️ Highly recommended
Very attentive staff, they answer all your questions very well and they get you good compensation, highly recommended 👍🏽👍🏽

I loved the service. Zaira was very attentive. She came to my studio to assist me. She was very clear and always answered all my questions. They also provided a good financial compensation. Very good service, fast, honest, and loyal. Thank you for all your help.
Highly recommend! Made my process so much easier.
Thanks for all you help Saira Araujo you are the best always answering all our questions and concerns . We are so apréciate all you help

Very good service and very good communication and good treatment from each of the people who handled my case. I am very grateful to Miss Tania and Nancy and Mr. David in particular for always being attentive to me and my recovery. Thank you very much ❤️
I really liked the attention given to their customers and any questions or concerns are answered and attended to in every call we make.

Amazing work as always! 2nd claim I’ve had them handle. Kept me updated and I didn’t have to worry about a thing! They handled everything from medical to insurance. Once they’re on it, I don’t have to talk to anyone else or jump through hoops. They answer my questions before I can ask them.
They speak Spanish. They always answered my calls and I received fair compensation!

I do not recommend this place. My case took a long time, but that's not the issue. The issue is that I never once spoke with my attorney until the deposition was scheduled. When I arrived, he did not discuss my case or prepare me. Instead, he boasted about what a great lawyer he was and how, if needed, he would go to court with me, having already won many cases for this company.

Closer to the settlement, just two days before, he handed my case to another attorney. She told me she had worked on my case for 24 hours and had read everything. She then advised me against going to court with them, stating she knew the company and that winning against them was impossible, although I never intended to go to court.

The settlement was terrible, with many details overlooked. When I saw the attorney's fee of 40% for someone who spoke with me once in over three years and never returned my calls, I was shocked. When I asked him a question,  he said I needed to call another client, no apologized then disappeared into another office and did not return to speak with me. This is unacceptable. He made it clear that my case was not important to him. Why did he take it then?
Additionally, the doctor working with him billed twice under different names. When I asked about this, the office told me they were aware that it was the same doctor, but that other people were working under him. If you want to be neglected and disrespected as a client, turn to them—they will be happy to "help" you.

Had Adler for attn. he sent me here and I can't even get them to return a phone call and the lady that answers the phone doesn't take messages.
Maybe if they would just have the consideration to contact you, I might feel different as for now I couldn't recommend this office of attns for anything.
Great experience with López & morales
They helped me with my auto accident and choosing them was the best decision I ever made

RE Lopez and Morales was amazing they helped me throughout my entire process my car was sandwiched. We reached out to them regarding the accident I worked with Tonya, and Nancy they helped me and guided me through the entire process! 10/10 Would definitely recommend!
An excellent job in my opinion

I appreciated the service and they helped me with my medical expenses. I highly recommend them. They speak Spanish fluently and assist you throughout the entire process. I am extremely grateful for the attention they provided.
I highly recommend these lawyers; they resolved my case quickly and with a good settlement. Thank you.
some very good lawyers I received a good compensation
Great people to work with I recommend them with auto accident assistance

Thanks to the lawyers for their legal help after my accident. I had resigned myself to the fact that it was a lost cause, but they fought and won. I am very satisfied and grateful to them. I recommend them to all my fellow countrymen.

Highly recommended! They helped me with my car accident case, and communication was easy. They were always attentive to my needs. Very professional and their customer service was excellent! Thank you for your support!
The lawyers helped me with the entire process. They closed my case in 5 months, and I'm very satisfied with the results. Thank you; I highly recommend them—they're the best lawyers.

Me and my lil brother got into a pretty rough accident, and R. E. Lopez & Morales were with us every step of the way. They got us paid and completely taken care of in a matter of months. Highly recommend !

The lawyers helped me throughout the entire process; I didn't have to worry about a thing. They kept me informed, handled my medical expenses, and fought for my compensation. I highly recommend them; they speak Spanish.

would never recommend to a friend or family member.
1.staff were very unprofessional.
2.Calls would get bounced around or told to call back and get someone else.
3.zero follow up. Good luck trying to get any kind of response back.
4. You only talk to the lawyer once and that's it. You will be dealing with back office run around for the rest of your case.
5. I had family members tell me I got ripped off by this lawyer and that my case was handled poorly compared to other local lawyers

6. ironically the fastest communication I got was the push to sign my paperwork to finalize the case.
7. good luck trying to get the simplest question answered like "what is your fax or email?" because no one in that office could answer that question and being bounced around, hung up on, and told to hold was unbelievable.

overall highly dissatisfied with the service, quality, and process of this firm.
I absolutely loved my experience, and I can honestly say I couldn't be happier with their work.
Excellent service. They kept me informed about my car accident case at all times.
Does someone know if he is still practicing? His phone is not in service anymore

Always handle my tickets out of Garland. Super fast. Kept them off my record. Would recommend him in a heartbeat for garland at least ,did reach out to him for a Dallas to get recently and he referred me to somebody else.
Used to use him all the time would not recommend now doesn’t answer phone nobody is at his office all week long

He is kind and does his job with love for those he engage, a huge blessing to have found him a couple of years back, I will call him even if is not for tickets, he will guide you or give you a referral for someone as helpful as he is, a total angel, for sure!!...
He helped my son and give him advise, he sure sets a high standard for those in law business, wonderful person, he is super communicative, great experience, he sets the standard for work ethic.
He is knowledgeable and Amazing!!
Gave some great free information when I called in much appreciated
Left a message for information and help. Mr. Morrow returned my call. Gave me info. If you need help he can do it.
The best attorney in Garland, Dallas Area. 100 percent success. Very responsive and helpful.
Was able to get me deferred adjudication.  No need to go to court.
Great personality friendly outright and honest
Awesome guy
Does what he says..
Very nice and upfront with you about everything. I would reccomend this attorney to everyone.
Thanks Mr. Morrow! You took care of my wife's ticket last min to avoid a catastrophe lol. You are the best!

Mr. Morrow answers the phone personally or responds to messages promptly, himself. No receptionist or referral service runarounds. Polite, efficient, reasonably priced. Got the late fee waived on my speeding ticket and kept it off my record with no defensive driving course or court appearance (200 miles away) required.

Kyle did not do anything to help with my traffic ticket. Paid kyle $100 to help with my traffic ticket and still paid $170 for my ticket. I was offered to pay 200 before I hired Mr. Morrow. Just waisted 100 to do something I could already agreed to before hand.

Mr. Morrow is a man of his word with results. Great experience with Mr. Morrow. i highly recommend and if there were more stars id give them.He helped me with some old traffic tickets during this pandemic and was able to dismiss them. Thank you.

I reached out to him yesterday super concerned about 2 Garland tickets. I was schedule to take my driving test today but was afraid I would get arrested due to these tickets so decided to call a couple of attorneys first thing in the morning before my afternoon test drive. I had one attorney just say he would charge me $200 without even looking online to see what my situation was. Had a 2nd attorney referred me to someone else and last Mr Kyle reached back to me after hearing my voice mail asked for my information, said give 5 mins I’ll call you back. He did as he said he called back in 5 mins with good news, he explained to me that I didn’t have any tickets anymore, they were dismissed, even gave me the date they were removed. He also explained in great details EVERYTHING! Even went an extra mile and made sure if I arrived at the DMV I would pull up clear! He seriously was an angel sent to me after stressing! The best part he said - “You don’t owe me anything”!! He’s an honest, nice, professional and organized attorney. Thank you so much!
Helps u if u work with him hes my go to.
Does a great job handling traffic tickets

If you get a traffic ticket in Texas .. Hire Kyle Morrow ... Texas has so many new laws now that they will suspend your license and charge you an outrageous surcharge ... Kyle did an awesome job taking care of my issue and did it very quickly ...

About 3 1/2 years ago. My coworker referred me to him and it was the best decision I have ever made! I am one of those who was naive about paying the tickets off and I didn't know anything about lawyers. Mr. Morrow KNOWS his law, a straightforward kind of guy, and he prefers cash.
He took care of a few tickets that I have! I received a differed on top of taking my defense course so my offense will not be on my record.
I do recommend him! No doubts, no worries!

He's a very good and honest lawyer. He handles cases in Dallas, Irving, and Rowlett. Very reasonable prices. Always great work!
I've known him since 2005.
Very professional does good on tickets

reviews.text: My review is not positive.  I signed a letter of employment to represent the death of my husband after 20 days in a nursing home.  After over a year plus, I received updates that medical records were being reviewed.  To my knowledge medical records were never ordered.  Fast forward, received a letter that went to a mailbox where I hadn't lived in a year; I was able to find a law firm to represent me in Houston.  I secured all medical records (which took quite some time), delivered to them, only to run out of the 2 year Statute of Limitations.  I personally feel I was strung along and because of your Firm I was not able to make what my husband experienced to account for something and make the nursing home accountable.

I will start by saying, "Powers Taylor is an Awesome law firm in my opinion and experience !!" I would without a DOUBT recommend anyone that's in need of a great attorneys office that is caring and attentive to whatever you may be going through, contact Powers Taylor Law Firm to see if they can be of help to you. I would like to thank attorney Ken Farah, Vanessa and anyone else at your office that assisted in the amazing work and time spent handling the case involving my mom. Ken Farah and Vanessa kept me informed throughout the entire process. In conclusion, myself and family thank you and entire staff for what you do !! Nothing can bring my mom back, but I can only pray that the place she was at which led to this can change their practices going forward.  Thank you !!
reviews.ownerResponse: Dennis- Thank you for your heartfelt review and recommendation. We're deeply grateful for the opportunity to have assisted you and your family during such a challenging time. Your kind words about our team, especially Ken Farah and Vanessa, mean a lot to us. While nothing can replace your loss, we're committed to continually improving and advocating for positive change. reviews.text:
I'll write this in Spanish too, because I don't want you to be scammed by this type of service that pretends to be professional, and then after you pay, they completely disappear without answering you or giving you any explanation. It's a complete scam, and you can lose more than 5,000, which isn't easy to earn, but for them it is, lying to you that they can help you and then they stop responding. This was my experience with Félix Gálvez and his paralegal.

Don't fall for this scam by people who call themselves professionals, because after you pay them they disappear and never answer you again, which is frustrating, and you can easily lose more than 5,000.

I’d like to thank the entire firm for their hard work regarding my removal proceedings case that seemed nearly impossible to win. I was required to show up for my individual hearing this March . Attorneys Felix & Miguel filed a motion to dismiss my case which in such a short amount of time seemed impossible to even receive a response before the court date . We submitted the motion two weeks ago and today it was the judge GRANTED the motion to dismiss !!! I am beyond grateful for all their support and effort . I’d also like to thank Paralegal Alejandra for all her patience and support ! She was very helpful throughout this process and kept us updated with everything happening . I am still in disbelief on how quick things moved in such a short amount of time. I would recommend this firm to anyone in need of a firm who will truly break it down for you with all honesty. I’d also like to mention they are very understanding with payments and will work out a plan for you . I am now looking forward to continue my path for hopefully residency in the future !! Thank you from the Cruz family 🙏🏼
reviews.ownerResponse: Ana, reading your message brought a big smile to our team. Removal proceedings can feel overwhelming, especially with an individual hearing approaching, and we knew how important that motion to dismiss was for you and your family. When the judge granted it, we were just as excited as you were. Felix and Miguel worked diligently on the strategy, and Alejandra will be so happy to know her patience and updates made a difference for you. Thank you for trusting us with such an important immigration matter. We look forward to continuing to support you as you pursue residency and build your future.

reviews.text:
We reached out to The Presti Law Firm when my husband was in immigration detention in Texas. It was one of the most difficult periods of our lives, and we felt completely overwhelmed and without options.

Filing a Habeas Corpus petition became our only real hope. Felix, our attorney, filed the Habeas in federal court, and soon after filing, the case began moving forward. Seeing progress so quickly gave our family the first real sense of hope after a long period of fear and uncertainty.

Throughout this process, Alejandro, the legal assistant, stayed in contact with us, answered our questions, and kept me informed. That communication meant so much during such a stressful and emotional time.

In the end, my husband was released. For our family, this was not just a legal result — it meant bringing a husband and father back home.

We are truly grateful for their professionalism, dedication, and the care they showed during one of the hardest moments of our lives. We will always remember what this meant for our family.
reviews.ownerResponse: Shahnoza, reading your words means more to us than we can fully express. We know how frightening and overwhelming immigration detention can be for a family, and we are honored that you trusted The Presti Law Firm during such a critical time. Filing a federal Habeas Corpus petition is never a small step, and we are grateful you recognized the work Felix put into moving the case forward so quickly. We are also glad Alejandro was able to stay closely connected with you throughout the process, because clear communication matters deeply when everything feels uncertain. Hearing that your husband is back home where he belongs is exactly why we do this work in immigration law. Thank you for allowing us to stand with your family during such a difficult chapter.

Research this firm. Check reviews and complaints.  Lots of bad reviews and unsatisfied clients. Many fed comp firms out in Texas and Kentucky who can help you for far better rates. Some even read and respond to your emails for free or a small flat rate. This firm, is all about the money not you.

"Javier had previously attempted to file a fraudulent fee dispute with his financial institution (i.e. credit card) where he was trying to get a credit card refund AFTER he had received our law firm's services and work was completed.
